Smart Nutrition

Delicious Taste, Clean Ingredients

We believe nutrition shouldn't be a compromise. Kidova Pro combines the irresistible taste of Belgian chocolate with ingredients you can feel good about.

  • check_circle

    Rich Belgian Chocolate Flavor

    A taste kids actually ask for.

  • check_circle

    Zero Artificial Preservatives

    Keeping it natural and safe.

  • check_circle

    Gluten-Free Formula

    Safe for sensitive tummies.

  • check_circle

    Easy to Digest

    Gentle on the stomach for daily use.

As Easy as 1-2-3

Prepare a nutritious shake in seconds.

1

Scoop

Add one level scoop of Kidova Pro powder to a glass or shaker.

2

Mix

Pour 200ml of cold milk or water over the powder.

3

Enjoy

Stir well until smooth and watch them fuel their inner champion!
